title: Seiji Mizushima
html:
Seiji Mizushima (水島 精二) was an episode director for the Evangelion TV series (Episode 09). Mizushima has also directed other major works such as Full Metal Alchemist, Shaman King, and Mobile Suit Gundam 00.


This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!

Staff

summary: Seiji Mizushima (水島 精二) was an episode director for the Evangelion TV series (Episode 09). Mizushima has also directed other major works such as Full Metal Alchemist, Shaman King, and Mobile Suit Gundam 00.
